options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates of the area to verify

options.name: -detailed
options.description: Generates a detailed cut density report

options.name: -globalDensity
options.description: Checks the density across the entire design for the specified cut layers and writes the results to the report file

options.name: -ignoreCellBlock
options.description: Ignore reporting the windows which are fully coverd by Block/Pad

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the cut layers to verify

options.name: -oversize
options.description: Specifies an offset value for the area to verify

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file for the cut density violation information
